purpose: Convert feature suggestions from UniversalFeatureArchitect into a prioritized, sprint-ready backlog and roadmap that respects dependencies and user priorities.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: Immediately after UniversalFeatureArchitect proposes new suggestions.
required_input: Latest Universal_startup_suggestions payload (suggestions list with IDs and target modules).
Any user preferences about priorities (e.g., deployment first, optimizer later).

core_functions: Group suggestions into themes and epics.
Assign rough priority, complexity, and risk scores.
Create sprint-sized batches and milestone groupings.
Emit an ordered backlog that ImplementationPlanner can turn into concrete plans.
